yonin.subtitle: Four-player shogi variant on a 9x9 board
yonin.createDesc: Create a new game room and share the link with friends.
yonin.shareLink: Share this link with other players to join:
yonin.cpHint: Show the bot's centipawn evaluation of each move it plays
yonin.easyDesc: Plays fast and makes random mistakes; may hang pieces.
yonin.mediumDesc: Captures freely and avoids obvious blunders (1-move lookahead).
yonin.hardDesc: Weighs every move, seeks checks/mates and avoids hanging pieces.
yonin.rule1: 4 players on a standard 9x9 shogi board, each with King, Rook, 2 Golds, 2 Silvers, 3 Pawns
yonin.rule2: Turns proceed clockwise. When a king is in check, the threatened player moves next.
yonin.rule3: Captured pieces go to the capturing player's hand and can be dropped.
yonin.rule4: A checkmated player is eliminated. Their pieces transfer to the player who delivered checkmate.
yonin.rule5: The eliminated king stays on the board as an obstacle (cannot be captured or moved).
yonin.soloDesc: Play alone against computer opponents — no friends needed.
yonin.tut.title: Yonin Shogi Tutorial
yonin.tut.subtitle: Learn the rules step by step on a real board.
yonin.tut.introBody: Four armies face the center from South, West, North and East — each with a King, a Rook, 2 Golds, 2 Silvers and 3 Pawns. You play South (gold pieces at the bottom); every piece moves toward the center. Goal: be the last king standing. Press Next to begin.
yonin.tut.moveBody: It's your turn (South). Click your Rook (飛) to reveal its moves, then click a highlighted square. The Rook slides any distance in a straight line.
yonin.tut.moveHint: Click the Rook (飛) first, then a highlighted square.
yonin.tut.captureBody: Capture the enemy pawn in front of your Gold (金). Captured pieces go into your hand — you can drop them back later as your own.
yonin.tut.captureHint: Select your Gold (金) and take the pawn directly ahead.
yonin.tut.dropBody: You captured a Pawn — it now sits in your hand below the board. Click it, then drop it onto any highlighted empty square. (You may not drop a second unpromoted pawn on a file you already occupy — that is 'nifu'.)
yonin.tut.dropHint: Click the Pawn in your hand, then a highlighted square.
yonin.tut.promoteBody: Move your Pawn one step forward into the promotion zone (the 3 ranks nearest the far side) and choose to promote. A promoted Pawn (と) then moves like a Gold.
yonin.tut.promoteHint: Move the Pawn forward, then choose 'Promote'.
yonin.tut.checkBody: Move your Gold up to attack the North King — that is check. Special rule: when you check a player, that player must answer on the very next turn, jumping ahead of the normal clockwise order.
yonin.tut.checkHint: Move the Gold (金) one step forward to attack the King.
yonin.tut.mateBody: Drop your Gold (in hand) right in front of the North King to checkmate it. A checkmated player is eliminated: their pieces come under your control (but keep moving in their original direction), and their King stays on the board as a dead obstacle.
yonin.tut.mateHint: Drop the Gold on the empty square directly in front of the King.
yonin.tut.doneBody: That's it — you can move, capture, drop, promote, give check and deliver checkmate. The last player with a living king wins. Time to play!
